sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval source for material code AMI01-01039A, FILM-PROTECTION_PET, for model 2G DETECTOR from K-WON Corporation.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports part approval and design-development output traceability for a protection PET film part, including dimensions, inspection results, checklist items, and EC history.
keyPoints: Material code is AMI01-01039A and description is FILM-PROTECTION_PET.
Model is 2G DETECTOR and vendor is K-WON Corporation.
Specified dimensions include 283.5 ± 0.3 mm width, 242.5 ± 0.3 mm length, and 0.07 ± 0.004 mm thickness, all marked OK.
Hole 4 through Hole 8 are specified as 14 mm and marked OK.
EC history lists Rev. 00 dated 22.06.03 with comment 신규 승인.
The part should not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.

reviewFlags.reason: Revision field near the material code is blank, while EC history separately lists Rev. 00.
No external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified; authority is internal to Samsung Electronics Co. and the proposal division.
The source contains two form version lines, Form Version 03 and Form Version 00, without a filled form number.
